scripts.db:reset: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "BEGIN; DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS app CASCADE; COMMIT;" && psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f ./docs/db/schema.sql'
scripts.db:up: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'set -e; files=$(find ./db/migrations -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.up.sql" | sort); [ -n "$files" ] || { echo "No up migrations found"; exit 0; }; for f in $files; do echo "Applying $f"; psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "$f"; done'
scripts.db:down: dotenv -e .env.local -- sh -c 'set -e; files=$(find ./db/migrations -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "*.down.sql" | sort -r); [ -n "$files" ] || { echo "No down migrations found"; exit 0; }; for f in $files; do echo "Reverting $f"; psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -f "$f"; done'
scripts.db:reset:fixtures: npm run db:reset && npm run db:fixtures
